---
title: "Joshua M. Felton"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: journal
    highlight: zenburn
---
  
# Introduction

Hello, I'm Joshua M. Felton, a PhD student at Cornell University focused on phylogenetics and evolutionary biology. My research explores the intersection of mating systems, genetic diversity, and adaptation in epiphytic plants, particularly *Catopsis nutans*. I use genomic tools and field data to understand how reproductive strategies shape the evolution of plant species.

I am currently working on projects related to the phylogeny of *Catopsis*, exploring genetic structure across populations, and investigating the role of life history and breeding systems in shaping biodiversity.

![My GitHub Commits](https://ghchart.rshah.org/409ba5/Frisbeejosh)

Feel free to browse my website to learn more about my research and projects.
